overall.description: A nighttime drive along a rain-soaked highway with heavy downpour reducing visibility. The camera moves steadily forward past overhead gantries and light poles, with distant city lights visible through the haze. The footage appears to be from a game engine with cinematic lighting and atmospheric rain effects.

events.description: passes directly under the overhead gantry structure
exits the area under the gantry into open highway stretch

agents.ego_description: driving steadily forward on the rain-slicked highway, passing under the overhead sign gantry

entered.detail: large metal highway gantry with illuminated signs suspended over the road
concrete divider separating highway lanes with reflective markers
twinkling urban lights visible through the rain haze on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the vehicle approaching and passing under a large overhead highway gantry in heavy rain. The concrete barrier runs along the left side while distant city lights glow through the storm. The camera moves steadily forward, passing directly under the gantry structure before emerging into the open highway stretch.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway with distant urban skyline

events.description: passes a vertical light pole on the left side of the highway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway at steady speed, with the city lights visible ahead through the heavy rain

entered.detail: tall curved street light pole along the highway edge

segments.scene_description: Driving along the open highway stretch with the gantry now behind. The distant city lights shift to the left as the vehicle progresses. A highway light pole approaches and passes on the left side, momentarily occluding the view. The rain continues steadily, creating reflections on the wet asphalt surface.

events.description: road curves gently to the left
vehicle taillights become visible ahead in the distance

agents.ego_description: navigating the gentle left curve of the highway, approaching a vehicle ahead with visible red taillights

notable_agents.action: vehicle driving ahead with red taillights visible through the rain, maintaining distance

entered.detail: another highway light pole approaching on the left side
car with illuminated red taillights driving in the same lane ahead

segments.scene_description: The highway curves gently to the left as the vehicle continues through the heavy rain. Another light pole passes by on the left, and the distant city lights shift to the right side of the frame. A vehicle ahead becomes visible with its red taillights glowing through the rain, indicating traffic ahead on the wet highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a rain-soaked highway that transitions from passing under industrial structures to encountering traffic on a curving road. It begins by gliding under a large overhead highway gantry, with a concrete barrier to the left and distant city lights glowing through the heavy storm. As the vehicle emerges into an open stretch, the camera passes a highway light pole that momentarily occludes the view while reflections shimmer on the wet asphalt. The scene then shifts as the highway curves gently to the left, causing the distant city lights to migrate across the frame. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal the glowing red taillights of a vehicle ahead, signaling a transition into traffic amidst the persistent downpour.
